Resource Profile: AS PractitionerRole Profile

Official URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-practitionerrole Version: 0.0.3
Active as of 2023-05-02 Computable Name: ASPractitionerRoleProfile

Profil créé à partir de la ressource PractitionerRole dans le contexte de l’Annuaire Santé pour décrire l’exercice professionel et la situation d’exercice contient les informations décrivant notamment la profession exercée, l’identité d’exercice d’un professionnel, le cadre de son exercice (civil, militaire, etc.) ainsi que les caractéristiques de l’exercice d’un professionnel pendant une période déterminée et dans une structure déterminée.

Usage:

  • This Resource Profile is not used by any profiles in this Implementation Guide

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description of Profiles, Differentials, Snapshots and how the different presentations work.

  • Text Summary
  • Differential Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Snapshot Table (Must Support)
  • All

This structure is derived from FrPractitionerRoleExercice

Summary

Must-Support: 43 elements

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • CodeableConceptTimed (https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/codeableConcept-timed)
  • FrLocation (http://interopsante.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/FrLocation)

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-practitionerrole-name
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-registration
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-educationLevel
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-smartCard
  • http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element PractitionerRole.code.coding is sliced based on the value of value:system
  • The element PractitionerRole.specialty is sliced based on the value of value:coding.system

This structure is derived from FrPractitionerRoleExercice

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
​ PractitionerRole 0..*FrPractitionerRoleExerciceRoles/organizations the practitioner is associated with
​ practitionerRole-name S0..1(Complex)AutoriteEnregistrement
URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-practitionerrole-name
​ PractitionerRoleRegistration S0..*(Complex)Optional Extensions Element
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-registration
​ practitionerRole-educationLevel S0..1(Complex)SavoirFaire
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-educationLevel
​ practitionerRole-smartCard S0..1(Complex)CarteProfessionnel
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-smartCard
​ as-mailbox-mss S0..*(Complex)""BoiteLettreMSS"
URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss
​ identifier S0..*IdentifieridFonctionnel
​ system 0..1urisystem
​ value 0..1stringidActivite
​ active S0..1booleanisActive
​ period S0..1PeriodThe period during which the practitioner is authorized to perform in these role(s)
​ start 0..1dateTime[DR] : dateDebutActivite
​ end 0..1dateTime[DR] : dateFinActivite
​ practitioner S0..1Reference(FrPractitioner)idPP
​ organization S0..1Reference(FrOrganization)idStructure
​ code
​ Slices for coding 0..*CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:system
​ coding:CategorieProfession S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J89-CategorieProfessionnelle-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J89-CategorieProfessionnelle-RASS (required): Ensemble des catégories professionnelles indiqant Indique si le professionnel exerce sa profession en tant que Militaire, Civil, Fonctionnaire ou Etudiant

​ system 0..1uricategorieProfessionnelle
​ coding:professionG15 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Ensemble des professions de santé définies par le code de la santé publique

​ system 0..1uriprofessionSante
​ coding:professionR94 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Ensemble des professions du social

​ system 0..1uriprofessionSocial
​ coding:professionR95 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Ensemble des professions à usage de titre professionnel

​ system 0..1uriusagerTitre
​ coding:professionR291 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Liste de professionnels non membres d'une profession réglementée

​ system 0..1uriautreProfession
​ coding:genreActivite S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J94-GenreActivite-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J94-GenreActivite-RASS (required): Le genre d'activité identifie les activités qui nécessitent l’application de règles de gestion spécifiques

​ system 0..1urigenreActivite
​ coding:modeExercice S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J95-ModeExercice-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J95-ModeExercice-RASS (required): Le mode d'exercice décrit selon quelle modalité une activité est exercée au regard de l'organisation de la rétribution du professionnel

​ system 0..1urimodeExercice
​ coding:typeActiviteLiberale S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J96-TypeActiviteLiberale-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J96-TypeActiviteLiberale-RASS (required): Type d’activité libérale, par exemple: Cabinet; Secteur privé à l'hôpital

​ system 0..1uritypeActiviteLiberale
​ coding:statutProfessionnelSSA S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J97-StatutProfessionnelSSA-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J97-StatutProfessionnelSSA-RASS (required): Statut du professionnel du Service de santé des armées

​ system 0..1uristatutProfessionnelSSA
​ coding:statutHospitalier S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J98-StatutHospitalier-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J98-StatutHospitalier-RASS (required): Statut hospitalier dans le cas d’une activité exercée en établissement public de santé

​ system 0..1uristatutHospitalier
​ coding:fonctionR21 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS (required): Ensemble des fonctions et rôles du professionel au sein de la stucture d'exercice

​ system 0..1urifonction
​ coding:fonctionR96 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS (required): Ensemble des fonctions et rôles du professionel au sein de la stucture d'exercice

​ system 0..1uriautreFonctionSanitaire
​ coding:fonctionR85 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS (required): Liste des rôles dans la prise en charge des patients ou des usagers

​ system 0..1urirolePriseCharge
​ coding:metierPharmacienR06 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J73-MetierPharmacien-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J73-MetierPharmacien-RASS (required): Liste des sections du tableau de l'Ordre des Pharmaciens

​ system 0..1urisectionTableauCNOP
​ coding:metierPharmacienG05 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J73-MetierPharmacien-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J73-MetierPharmacien-RASS (required): Liste des sous-sections du tableau de l'Ordre des Pharmaciens

​ system 0..1urisousSectionTableauCNOP

Slice: Unordered, Open by value:coding.system

​ coding

​ coding

Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Liste des diplômes d'études spécialisées complémentaires

​ coding

Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Liste des fonctions qualifiées


​ coding
​ system 0..1urifonctionQualifiee

Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Liste des droitd d'exercice complémentaires


​ coding

Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Liste des orientations particulières


​ coding

​ notAvailable S0..*BackboneElementNot available during this time due to provided reason

id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

type ΣN0..1CodeableConceptDescription of identifier
Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

system Σ0..1urisystem
Example General: http://www.acme.com/identifiers/patient
value Σ0..1stringidActivite
Example General: 123456
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when id is/was valid for use
assigner ΣCN0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that issued id (may be just text)
active SΣ0..1booleanisActive
period SΣC0..1PeriodThe period during which the practitioner is authorized to perform in these role(s)

end ΣC0..1dateTime[DR] : dateFinActivite
practitioner SΣC0..1Reference(FrPractitioner)idPP
organization SΣC0..1Reference(FrOrganization)idStructure

Binding: fr-practioner-role-exercice (required): The role a person plays representing an organization | Rôle (situation d'exercice) du professionnel de santé au sein de l'organisation. Correspond à la notion de Fonction dans le NOS.

system Σ0..1uritypeSavoirFaire

display Σ0..1stringRepresentation defined by the system

text Σ0..1stringPlain text representation of the concept
location SΣC0..*Reference(FrLocation) {c}idLocation
healthcareService SC0..*Reference(FrHealthcareService)The list of healthcare services that this worker provides for this role's Organization/Location(s)
telecom SΣC0..*FrContactPointDetails of a Technology mediated contact point | Coordonnées électroniques détaillées
availableTime S0..*BackboneElementTimes the Service Site is available
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
modifierExtension ?!ΣN0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
daysOfWeek 0..*codemon | tue | wed | thu | fri | sat | sun
Binding: DaysOfWeek (required): The days of the week.


allDay 0..1booleanAlways available? e.g. 24 hour service
availableStartTime 0..1timeOpening time of day (ignored if allDay = true)
availableEndTime 0..1timeClosing time of day (ignored if allDay = true)
notAvailable S0..*BackboneElementNot available during this time due to provided reason
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
modifierExtension ?!ΣN0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
description 1..1stringReason presented to the user explaining why time not available
during CN0..1PeriodService not available from this date
availabilityExceptions S0..1stringDescription of availability exceptions
endpoint SC0..*Reference(Endpoint)Technical endpoints providing access to services operated for the practitioner with this role

Documentation for this format
NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
​ PractitionerRole 0..*FrPractitionerRoleExerciceRoles/organizations the practitioner is associated with
​ practitionerRole-name 0..1(Complex)AutoriteEnregistrement
URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-practitionerrole-name
​ PractitionerRoleRegistration 0..*(Complex)Optional Extensions Element
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-registration
​ practitionerRole-educationLevel 0..1(Complex)SavoirFaire
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-educationLevel
​ practitionerRole-smartCard 0..1(Complex)CarteProfessionnel
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-smartCard
​ as-mailbox-mss 0..*(Complex)""BoiteLettreMSS"
URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss
​ identifier Σ0..*IdentifieridFonctionnel
​ active Σ0..1booleanisActive
​ period ΣC0..1PeriodThe period during which the practitioner is authorized to perform in these role(s)
​ practitioner ΣC0..1Reference(FrPractitioner)idPP
​ organization ΣC0..1Reference(FrOrganization)idStructure
​ code ΣN0..*CodeableConceptThe role a person plays representing an organization | Rôle (situation d'exercice) du professionnel de santé au sein de l'organisation
​ coding:CategorieProfession Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J89-CategorieProfessionnelle-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J89-CategorieProfessionnelle-RASS (required): Ensemble des catégories professionnelles indiqant Indique si le professionnel exerce sa profession en tant que Militaire, Civil, Fonctionnaire ou Etudiant


​ coding:professionG15 Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Ensemble des professions de santé définies par le code de la santé publique


​ coding:professionR94 Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Ensemble des professions du social


​ coding:professionR95 Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Ensemble des professions à usage de titre professionnel


​ coding:professionR291 Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Liste de professionnels non membres d'une profession réglementée


​ coding:genreActivite Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J94-GenreActivite-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J94-GenreActivite-RASS (required): Le genre d'activité identifie les activités qui nécessitent l’application de règles de gestion spécifiques


​ coding:modeExercice Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J95-ModeExercice-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J95-ModeExercice-RASS (required): Le mode d'exercice décrit selon quelle modalité une activité est exercée au regard de l'organisation de la rétribution du professionnel


​ coding:typeActiviteLiberale Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J96-TypeActiviteLiberale-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J96-TypeActiviteLiberale-RASS (required): Type d’activité libérale, par exemple: Cabinet; Secteur privé à l'hôpital


​ coding:statutProfessionnelSSA Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J97-StatutProfessionnelSSA-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J97-StatutProfessionnelSSA-RASS (required): Statut du professionnel du Service de santé des armées


​ coding:statutHospitalier Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J98-StatutHospitalier-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J98-StatutHospitalier-RASS (required): Statut hospitalier dans le cas d’une activité exercée en établissement public de santé


​ coding:fonctionR21 Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS (required): Ensemble des fonctions et rôles du professionel au sein de la stucture d'exercice

Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS (required): Ensemble des fonctions et rôles du professionel au sein de la stucture d'exercice

Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J91-TypeSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J91-TypeSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Le type de savoir-faire (qualifications/autres attributions)


​ location ΣC0..*Reference(FrLocation) {c}idLocation
​ healthcareService C0..*Reference(FrHealthcareService)The list of healthcare services that this worker provides for this role's Organization/Location(s)
​ telecom ΣC0..*FrContactPointDetails of a Technology mediated contact point | Coordonnées électroniques détaillées
​ availableTime 0..*BackboneElementTimes the Service Site is available
​ notAvailable 0..*BackboneElementNot available during this time due to provided reason
​ availabilityExceptions 0..1stringDescription of availability exceptions
​ endpoint C0..*Reference(Endpoint)Technical endpoints providing access to services operated for the practitioner with this role

Documentation for this format

This structure is derived from FrPractitionerRoleExercice

Summary

Must-Support: 43 elements

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • CodeableConceptTimed (https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/codeableConcept-timed)
  • FrLocation (http://interopsante.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/FrLocation)

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-practitionerrole-name
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-registration
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-educationLevel
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-smartCard
  • http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element PractitionerRole.code.coding is sliced based on the value of value:system
  • The element PractitionerRole.specialty is sliced based on the value of value:coding.system

Differential View

This structure is derived from FrPractitionerRoleExercice

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
​ PractitionerRole 0..*FrPractitionerRoleExerciceRoles/organizations the practitioner is associated with
​ practitionerRole-name S0..1(Complex)AutoriteEnregistrement
URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-practitionerrole-name
​ PractitionerRoleRegistration S0..*(Complex)Optional Extensions Element
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-registration
​ practitionerRole-educationLevel S0..1(Complex)SavoirFaire
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-educationLevel
​ practitionerRole-smartCard S0..1(Complex)CarteProfessionnel
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-smartCard
​ as-mailbox-mss S0..*(Complex)""BoiteLettreMSS"
URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss
​ identifier S0..*IdentifieridFonctionnel
​ system 0..1urisystem
​ value 0..1stringidActivite
​ active S0..1booleanisActive
​ period S0..1PeriodThe period during which the practitioner is authorized to perform in these role(s)
​ start 0..1dateTime[DR] : dateDebutActivite
​ end 0..1dateTime[DR] : dateFinActivite
​ practitioner S0..1Reference(FrPractitioner)idPP
​ organization S0..1Reference(FrOrganization)idStructure
​ code
​ Slices for coding 0..*CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:system
​ coding:CategorieProfession S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J89-CategorieProfessionnelle-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J89-CategorieProfessionnelle-RASS (required): Ensemble des catégories professionnelles indiqant Indique si le professionnel exerce sa profession en tant que Militaire, Civil, Fonctionnaire ou Etudiant

​ system 0..1uricategorieProfessionnelle
​ coding:professionG15 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Ensemble des professions de santé définies par le code de la santé publique

​ system 0..1uriprofessionSante
​ coding:professionR94 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Ensemble des professions du social

​ system 0..1uriprofessionSocial
​ coding:professionR95 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Ensemble des professions à usage de titre professionnel

​ system 0..1uriusagerTitre
​ coding:professionR291 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Liste de professionnels non membres d'une profession réglementée

​ system 0..1uriautreProfession
​ coding:genreActivite S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J94-GenreActivite-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J94-GenreActivite-RASS (required): Le genre d'activité identifie les activités qui nécessitent l’application de règles de gestion spécifiques

​ system 0..1urigenreActivite
​ coding:modeExercice S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J95-ModeExercice-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J95-ModeExercice-RASS (required): Le mode d'exercice décrit selon quelle modalité une activité est exercée au regard de l'organisation de la rétribution du professionnel

​ system 0..1urimodeExercice
​ coding:typeActiviteLiberale S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J96-TypeActiviteLiberale-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J96-TypeActiviteLiberale-RASS (required): Type d’activité libérale, par exemple: Cabinet; Secteur privé à l'hôpital

​ system 0..1uritypeActiviteLiberale
​ coding:statutProfessionnelSSA S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J97-StatutProfessionnelSSA-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J97-StatutProfessionnelSSA-RASS (required): Statut du professionnel du Service de santé des armées

​ system 0..1uristatutProfessionnelSSA
​ coding:statutHospitalier S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J98-StatutHospitalier-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J98-StatutHospitalier-RASS (required): Statut hospitalier dans le cas d’une activité exercée en établissement public de santé

​ system 0..1uristatutHospitalier
​ coding:fonctionR21 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS (required): Ensemble des fonctions et rôles du professionel au sein de la stucture d'exercice

​ system 0..1urifonction
​ coding:fonctionR96 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS (required): Ensemble des fonctions et rôles du professionel au sein de la stucture d'exercice

​ system 0..1uriautreFonctionSanitaire
​ coding:fonctionR85 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS (required): Liste des rôles dans la prise en charge des patients ou des usagers

​ system 0..1urirolePriseCharge
​ coding:metierPharmacienR06 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J73-MetierPharmacien-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J73-MetierPharmacien-RASS (required): Liste des sections du tableau de l'Ordre des Pharmaciens

​ system 0..1urisectionTableauCNOP
​ coding:metierPharmacienG05 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J73-MetierPharmacien-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J73-MetierPharmacien-RASS (required): Liste des sous-sections du tableau de l'Ordre des Pharmaciens

​ system 0..1urisousSectionTableauCNOP
​ Slices for specialty 0..*CodeableConceptTimedConcept - reference to a terminology or just text
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:coding.system
​ specialty:attributionParticuliere S0..*CodeableConceptSpecific specialty associated with the agency | spécialité du professionnel de santé au sein de l'organisation
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J90-AttributionParticuliere-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J90-AttributionParticuliere-RASS (required): Activités ponctuelles du professionnel de type expertise


​ coding
​ system 0..1uriattributionParticuliere
​ specialty:savoirFaireR38 S0..*CodeableConceptSpecific specialty associated with the agency | spécialité du professionnel de santé au sein de l'organisation
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Liste des spécialités ordinales


​ coding
​ system 0..1urispecialiteOrdinal
​ specialty:savoirFaireR39 S0..*CodeableConceptSpecific specialty associated with the agency | spécialité du professionnel de santé au sein de l'organisation
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Liste des compétences acquises par le professionnel


​ coding
​ system 0..1uricompetence
​ specialty:savoirFaireR40 S0..*CodeableConceptSpecific specialty associated with the agency | spécialité du professionnel de santé au sein de l'organisation
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Liste des compétences exclusives


​ coding
​ system 0..1uricompetenceExclusive
​ specialty:savoirFaireR42 S0..*CodeableConceptSpecific specialty associated with the agency | spécialité du professionnel de santé au sein de l'organisation
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Liste des diplômes d'études spécialisées complémentaires


​ coding
​ system 0..1uriDESCnonQualifian
​ specialty:savoirFaireR43 S0..*CodeableConceptSpecific specialty associated with the agency | spécialité du professionnel de santé au sein de l'organisation
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Liste des capacités (savoir-faire) de médecine


​ coding
​ system 0..1uricapaciteSavoirFaire
​ specialty:savoirFaireR44 S0..*CodeableConceptSpecific specialty associated with the agency | spécialité du professionnel de santé au sein de l'organisation
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Liste des qualifications de praticien adjoint contractuel


​ coding
​ system 0..1uriqualificationPAC
​ specialty:savoirFaireR45 S0..*CodeableConceptSpecific specialty associated with the agency | spécialité du professionnel de santé au sein de l'organisation
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Liste des fonctions qualifiées


​ coding
​ system 0..1urifonctionQualifiee
​ specialty:savoirFaireR97 S0..*CodeableConceptSpecific specialty associated with the agency | spécialité du professionnel de santé au sein de l'organisation
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Liste des droitd d'exercice complémentaires


​ coding
​ system 0..1uridroitExerciceComplementaire
​ specialty:savoirFaireG13 S0..*CodeableConceptSpecific specialty associated with the agency | spécialité du professionnel de santé au sein de l'organisation
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Liste des orientations particulières


​ coding
​ system 0..1uriorientationParticuliere
​ specialty:typeSavoirFaire S0..*CodeableConceptSpecific specialty associated with the agency | spécialité du professionnel de santé au sein de l'organisation
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J91-TypeSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J91-TypeSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Le type de savoir-faire (qualifications/autres attributions)


​ coding
​ system 0..1uritypeSavoirFaire
​ location S0..*Reference(FrLocation) {c}idLocation
​ healthcareService S0..*Reference(FrHealthcareService)The list of healthcare services that this worker provides for this role's Organization/Location(s)
​ telecom S0..*FrContactPointDetails of a Technology mediated contact point | Coordonnées électroniques détaillées
​ availableTime S0..*BackboneElementTimes the Service Site is available
​ notAvailable S0..*BackboneElementNot available during this time due to provided reason
​ availabilityExceptions S0..1stringDescription of availability exceptions
​ endpoint S0..*Reference(Endpoint)Technical endpoints providing access to services operated for the practitioner with this role

Documentation for this format

Snapshot View

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
PractitionerRole 0..*FrPractitionerRoleExerciceRoles/organizations the practitioner is associated with
id Σ0..1idLogical id of this artifact
meta ΣN0..1MetaMetadata about the resource
implicitRules ?!Σ0..1uriA set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1codeLanguage of the resource content
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.

Additional BindingsPurpose
AllLanguagesMax Binding
text N0..1NarrativeText summary of the resource, for human interpretation
contained 0..*ResourceContained, inline Resources
Slices for extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
serviceTypeDuration N0..*(Complex)Optional Extensions Element
URL: http://interopsante.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/FrServiceTypeDuration
practitionerRole-name S0..1(Complex)AutoriteEnregistrement
URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-practitionerrole-name
PractitionerRoleRegistration S0..*(Complex)Optional Extensions Element
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-registration

URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-educationLevel

URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-smartCard
as-mailbox-mss S0..*(Complex)""BoiteLettreMSS"
URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss
modifierExtension ?!N0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
identifier SΣ0..*IdentifieridFonctionnel
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

type ΣN0..1CodeableConceptDescription of identifier
Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

system Σ0..1urisystem
Example General: http://www.acme.com/identifiers/patient
value Σ0..1stringidActivite
Example General: 123456
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when id is/was valid for use
assigner ΣCN0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that issued id (may be just text)
active SΣ0..1booleanisActive
period SΣC0..1PeriodThe period during which the practitioner is authorized to perform in these role(s)
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
start ΣC0..1dateTime[DR] : dateDebutActivite
end ΣC0..1dateTime[DR] : dateFinActivite
practitioner SΣC0..1Reference(FrPractitioner)idPP
organization SΣC0..1Reference(FrOrganization)idStructure
code ΣN0..*CodeableConceptThe role a person plays representing an organization | Rôle (situation d'exercice) du professionnel de santé au sein de l'organisation
Binding: fr-practioner-role-exercice (required): The role a person plays representing an organization | Rôle (situation d'exercice) du professionnel de santé au sein de l'organisation. Correspond à la notion de Fonction dans le NOS.

extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url

location SΣC0..*Reference(FrLocation) {c}idLocation
healthcareService SC0..*Reference(FrHealthcareService)The list of healthcare services that this worker provides for this role's Organization/Location(s)
telecom SΣC0..*FrContactPointDetails of a Technology mediated contact point | Coordonnées électroniques détaillées
availableTime S0..*BackboneElementTimes the Service Site is available
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
modifierExtension ?!ΣN0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
daysOfWeek 0..*codemon | tue | wed | thu | fri | sat | sun
Binding: DaysOfWeek (required): The days of the week.


allDay 0..1booleanAlways available? e.g. 24 hour service
availableStartTime 0..1timeOpening time of day (ignored if allDay = true)
availableEndTime 0..1timeClosing time of day (ignored if allDay = true)
notAvailable S0..*BackboneElementNot available during this time due to provided reason
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
modifierExtension ?!ΣN0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
description 1..1stringReason presented to the user explaining why time not available
during CN0..1PeriodService not available from this date
availabilityExceptions S0..1stringDescription of availability exceptions
endpoint SC0..*Reference(Endpoint)Technical endpoints providing access to services operated for the practitioner with this role

Documentation for this format

 

Other representations of profile: CSV, Excel, Schematron

Constraints

IdGradePath(s)DetailsRequirements
cpt-2errorPractitionerRole.telecomA system is required if a value is provided.
: value.empty() or system.exists()
ele-1error**ALL** elementsAll FHIR elements must have a @value or children
: hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1errorPractitionerRole.extension, PractitionerRole.extension:serviceTypeDuration, PractitionerRole.extension:practitionerRole-name, PractitionerRole.extension:PractitionerRoleRegistration, PractitionerRole.extension:practitionerRole-educationLevel, PractitionerRole.extension:practitionerRole-smartCard, PractitionerRole.extension:as-mailbox-mss, PractitionerRole.modifierExtension, PractitionerRole.identifier.extension, PractitionerRole.period.extension, PractitionerRole.code.extension, PractitionerRole.code.coding:CategorieProfession.extension, PractitionerRole.code.coding:professionG15.extension, PractitionerRole.code.coding:professionR94.extension, PractitionerRole.code.coding:professionR95.extension, PractitionerRole.code.coding:professionR291.extension, PractitionerRole.code.coding:genreActivite.extension, PractitionerRole.code.coding:modeExercice.extension, PractitionerRole.code.coding:typeActiviteLiberale.extension, PractitionerRole.code.coding:statutProfessionnelSSA.extension, PractitionerRole.code.coding:statutHospitalier.extension, PractitionerRole.code.coding:fonctionR21.extension, PractitionerRole.code.coding:fonctionR96.extension, PractitionerRole.code.coding:fonctionR85.extension, PractitionerRole.code.coding:metierPharmacienR06.extension, PractitionerRole.code.coding:metierPharmacienG05.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:attributionParticuliere.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:attributionParticuliere.coding.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireR38.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireR38.coding.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireR39.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireR39.coding.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireR40.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireR40.coding.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireR42.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireR42.coding.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireR43.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireR43.coding.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireR44.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireR44.coding.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireR45.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireR45.coding.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireR97.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireR97.coding.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireG13.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:savoirFaireG13.coding.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:typeSavoirFaire.extension, PractitionerRole.specialty:typeSavoirFaire.coding.extension, PractitionerRole.availableTime.extension, PractitionerRole.availableTime.modifierExtension, PractitionerRole.notAvailable.extension, PractitionerRole.notAvailable.modifierExtensionMust have either extensions or value[x], not both
: extension.exists() != value.exists()
per-1errorPractitionerRole.identifier.period, PractitionerRole.period, PractitionerRole.notAvailable.duringIf present, start SHALL have a lower value than end
: start.hasValue().not() or end.hasValue().not() or (start <= end)
ref-1errorPractitionerRole.identifier.assigner, PractitionerRole.practitioner, PractitionerRole.organization, PractitionerRole.location, PractitionerRole.healthcareService, PractitionerRole.endpointSHALL have a contained resource if a local reference is provided
: reference.startsWith('#').not() or (reference.substring(1).trace('url') in %rootResource.contained.id.trace('ids'))
